rules.name: Combat Doctrines
rules.description:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army. You can only select each Combat Doctrine once per battle.

■ Devastator Doctrine: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.
■ Tactical Doctrine: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
■ Assault Doctrine: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Only In Death Does Duty End
stratagems.description: Use in the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: Honour the Chapter
stratagems.description: Use when an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army is selected to fight. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability. If the Assault Doctrine is active for your army, also improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Storm of Fire
stratagems.description: Use when an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase is selected to shoot. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. If the Devastator Doctrine is active for your army, also improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Adaptive Strategy
stratagems.description: Use at the start of your Command phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army. Select any Combat Doctrine; until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for that unit only, independent of the army-wide doctrine selection.

stratagems.name: Squad Tactics
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army within 9" of that enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units. Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If the Tactical Doctrine is active for your army, move up to 6" instead.

In addition, while the bearer's unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

rules.name: Shadow Masters

stratagems.name: A Deadly Prize
stratagems.description: Use in your Command phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control. That objective marker is said to be Sabotaged, and remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective marker is Sabotaged and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Surgical Strikes
stratagems.description: Use when an ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase is selected to fight. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: Strike From The Shadows
stratagems.description: Use when an ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase is selected to shoot. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is more than 12" away, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Calculated Feint
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a PHOBOS or SCOUT SQUAD unit.

stratagems.name: Guerrilla Tactics
stratagems.description: Use at the end of your opponent's Fight phase. Remove up to two PHOBOS and/or SCOUT SQUAD units from your army, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. Each unit selected must be more than 3" from all enemy models.

enhancements.name: The Blade Driven Deep
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Ghostweave Cloak
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

enhancements.name: Execute and Redeploy
enhancements.description: PHOBOS model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer's unit has shot, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge. This cannot allow the bearer's unit to move more than once in your Shooting phase.

enhancements.name: Shadow War Veteran
enhancements.description: PHOBOS model only. The bearer has the following ability: Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

rules.name: Close-range Eradication
rules.description: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. In addition, each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Crucible of Battle
stratagems.description: Use when an ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase is selected to do so. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target within 6", add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Rapid Embarkation
stratagems.description: Use at the end of the Fight phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army with no models embarked, and one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT. Your Infantry unit can embark within that TRANSPORT.

stratagems.name: Immolation Protocols
stratagems.description: Use when an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase is selected to shoot. Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

stratagems.name: Onslaught of Fire
stratagems.description: Use when an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase is selected to shoot. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 12", add 1 to the Hit roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result, select one of those destroyed models; that model's unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: Burning Vengeance
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. One unit embarked within that TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

enhancements.name: Champion of Humanity
enhancements.description: TACTICUS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit can ignore any or all modifiers to their characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for them (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

enhancements.name: Forged in Battle
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, once per turn, after making a Hit roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

enhancements.name: Adamantine Mantle
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made with a Melta or Torrent weapon, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

enhancements.name: War-tempered Artifice
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. Add 3 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

rules.name: Extremis-level Threat
rules.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Heroes of the Chapter
stratagems.description: Use in your Shooting phase or the Fight phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: Terrifying Proficiency
stratagems.description: Use in your Fight phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and destroyed one or more enemy units this phase. In your opponent's next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test.

stratagems.name: Duty and Honour
stratagems.description: Use in your Movement phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: Orbital Teleportarium
stratagems.description: Use at the end of your opponent's Fight phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.

stratagems.name: Legendary Fortitude
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: The Imperium's Sword
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer's unit as well.

enhancements.name: Fear Made Manifest
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only (Aura). While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 6" of the bearer, each time that unit fails a Battle-shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Once per battle, when such an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test, you can choose for D3 models in that unit to be destroyed in this way instead.

enhancements.name: Rites of War
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearer's unit as well.

enhancements.name: Iron Resolve
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Once per battle, after the bearer's unit is selected as the target of one or more attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

rules.name: Shield of the Imperium
rules.description: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models from your army have the [HEAVY] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, if the attacking model's unit Remained Stationary this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Rigid Discipline
stratagems.description: Use at the end of the Fight phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army. Your unit can immediately make a Fall Back move of up to 6". When making that move, your unit must end that move either wholly within your deployment zone or within range of an objective marker.

stratagems.name: Not One Backwards Step
stratagems.description: Use in your Command phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army. Until the end of the turn, double the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit, but it must Remain Stationary this turn.

stratagems.name: No Threat Too Great
stratagems.description: Use in your Shooting phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Battle Drill Recall
stratagems.description: Use in your Shooting phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If your unit Remained Stationary this turn, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Hail of Vengeance
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

enhancements.name: Indomitable Fury
enhancements.description: GRAVIS model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Fleet Commander
enhancements.description: CAPTAIN model only. Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, select one point on the battlefield and place a marker there. At the start of your next Shooting phase, place another marker within 12" of the first. Draw a straight line between the two markers. Roll one D6 for each unit that line passes over or through: on a 3+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Both markers are then removed.

enhancements.name: Stoic Defender
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability while they are within range of an objective marker you control. While that unit is Battle-shocked, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit instead of changing it to 0.

enhancements.name: Architect of War
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

rules.name: Armoured Wrath
rules.description: Once per phase for each ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit in your army, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Unbowed Conviction
stratagems.description: Use in your Command phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength. Until the end of the turn, that unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

stratagems.name: Mercy is Weakness
stratagems.description: Use in your Shooting phase or the Fight phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If your unit is a VEHICLE, those attacks score Critical Hits on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ instead.

stratagems.name: Vengeful Animus
stratagems.description: Use when an ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed. Do not roll one D6 for that model's Deadly Demise ability; instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted (the maximum value).

stratagems.name: Ancient Fury
stratagems.description: Use in your Command phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER unit from your army. Until the start of your next Command phase, improve the Move, Toughness, Leadership, and Objective Control characteristics of that model by 1, and add 1 to Hit rolls made for that model.

stratagems.name: Power of the Machine Spirit
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army that was reduced below half wounds as a result of those attacks. Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

enhancements.name: Target Augury Web
enhancements.description: TECHMARINE model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, weapons equipped by that VEHICLE model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

enhancements.name: The Flesh is Weak
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Adept of the Omnissiah
enhancements.description: TECHMARINE model only. Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Master of Machine War
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that VEHICLE is eligible to shoot even if it Fell Back or Advanced this turn.

rules.name: Lightning Assault
rules.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Blitzing Fusillade
stratagems.description: Use when an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase is selected to shoot. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. If a weapon already has this ability, it has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability as well.

stratagems.name: Full Throttle
stratagems.description: Use in your Movement phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding WALKERS). Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or add 9" if your unit has the MOUNTED keyword.

stratagems.name: Shock Assault
stratagems.description: Use in your Charge phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase. Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for your unit and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: Ride Hard, Ride Fast
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Wind-swift Evasion
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army within 9" of that enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units. Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

enhancements.name: Fury of the Storm
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 2 instead.

enhancements.name: Portents of Wisdom
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Feinting Withdrawal
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Hunter's Instincts
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED model only. If the bearer's unit is placed into Strategic Reserves, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than the actual battle round for the purposes of determining when that unit can be set up on the battlefield.

rules.name: Psychic Disciplines
rules.description:
At the start of each battle round, select one of the following Psychic Disciplines to be active. Until the end of the battle round, its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER units from your army.

■ Biomancy: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.
■ Divination: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
■ Pyromancy: Each time a ranged attack made by a model in this unit targets an enemy unit within 12", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
■ Telekinesis: Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Strength characteristic of that attack.
■ Telepathy: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

choices.name: Biomancy
choices.effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of PSYKER models.

choices.name: Divination
choices.effect: Each time a PSYKER model makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

choices.name: Pyromancy
choices.effect: Ranged attacks by PSYKER models targeting enemies within 12" improve AP by 1.

choices.name: Telekinesis
choices.effect: Ranged attacks targeting PSYKER units subtract 1 from Strength.

choices.name: Telepathy
choices.effect: PSYKER models can ignore modifiers to WS, BS, and Hit rolls when attacking.

stratagems.name: Sensory Assault
stratagems.description: Use in your Command phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER unit from your army. Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to one PSYKER model in your unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit's Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it. If the Telepathy Discipline is active, that unit must also take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Fiery Shield
stratagems.description: Use in the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 18" of one or more friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER models and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If the Pyromancy Discipline is active, weapons used to make attacks targeting your unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

stratagems.name: Iron Arm
stratagems.description: Use in the Fight phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 18" of one or more ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER models from your army and has not been selected to fight this phase. Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. If the Biomancy Discipline is active, add 2 instead.

stratagems.name: Assail
stratagems.description: Use in your Shooting phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER unit from your army that is eligible to shoot. Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to one or more PSYKER models in your unit (excluding units benefiting from Lone Operative), and roll six D6. If the Telekinesis Discipline is active, add 1 to each result. For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: Prescient Precision
stratagems.description: Use in your Shooting phase. Target one ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If the Divination Discipline is active, those attacks also have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Prescience
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only (excluding TERMINATOR models). Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer's unit, the bearer's unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If the Divination Discipline is active, move up to 6" instead.

enhancements.name: Celerity
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If the Biomancy Discipline is active, it is also eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Obfuscation
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem against the bearer's unit. If the Telepathy Discipline is active, the bearer's unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Fusillade
enhancements.description: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+] abilities. If the Pyromancy Discipline is active, those weapons also have [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. If the Telekinesis Discipline is active, add 6" to the Range characteristic of those weapons.

oath_of_moment.name: Oath of Moment
oath_of_moment.description: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent's army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Oath of Moment target. Each time a model with this ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Hit roll. In addition, if you are using a Codex: Space Marines Detachment and your army does not include any units with the Black Templars, Blood Angels, Dark Angels, Deathwatch, or Space Wolves Faction keywords, you can also add 1 to the Wound roll.

weapon.name: Assault
weapon.description: Can shoot after Advancing at -1 to hit.

weapon.name: Heavy
weapon.description: +1 to hit if bearer Remained Stationary.

weapon.name: Rapid Fire X
weapon.description: Double attacks when targeting within half range.

weapon.name: Pistol
weapon.description: Can shoot in Engagement Range at units in Engagement Range.

weapon.name: Blast
weapon.description: +1 attack per 5 models in target unit.

weapon.name: Hazardous
weapon.description: After shooting, roll D6 per hazardous weapon. On 1, bearer takes 3 mortal wounds.

weapon.name: Devastating Wounds
weapon.description: Critical wounds inflict mortal wounds instead of normal damage.

weapon.name: Sustained Hits X
weapon.description: Critical hits generate X additional hits.

weapon.name: Ignores Cover
weapon.description: Target does not benefit from cover.

weapon.name: Melta X
weapon.description: Add X to Damage when targeting within half range.

weapon.name: Anti-X Y+
weapon.description: Critical wound on Y+ against targets with keyword X.

unit.name: Deep Strike

coreStratagems.name: Command Re-roll
coreStratagems.when: In any phase, just after you have made a Hit roll, a Wound roll, a Damage roll, a saving throw, an Advance roll, a Charge roll, a Desperate Escape test, a Hazardous test, or just after you have rolled the dice to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon.
coreStratagems.target: An attack, model or unit from your army.
coreStratagems.effect: You re-roll that roll, test or saving throw.
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: In any phase, just after you have made a Hit roll, a Wound roll, a Damage roll, a saving throw, an Advance roll, a Charge roll, a Desperate Escape test, a Hazardous test, or just after you have rolled the dice to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon. TARGET: An attack, model or unit from your army. EFFECT: You re-roll that roll, test or saving throw.

coreStratagems.name: Counter-offensive
coreStratagems.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has fought.
coreStratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has fought. TARGET: One unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and that has not already been selected to fight this phase. EFFECT: Your unit fights next.

coreStratagems.name: Epic Challenge
coreStratagems.when: Fight phase, when a CHARACTER unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more Attached units is selected to fight.
coreStratagems.target: One CHARACTER model in your unit.
coreStratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all melee attacks made by that model have the [PRECISION] ability.
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: Fight phase, when a CHARACTER unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more Attached units is selected to fight. TARGET: One CHARACTER model in your unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, all melee attacks made by that model have the [PRECISION] ability.

coreStratagems.name: Fire Overwatch
coreStratagems.when: Your opponent's Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or when an enemy unit starts or ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move.
coreStratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 24" of that enemy unit and that would be eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase.
coreStratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot that enemy unit as if it were your Shooting phase.
coreStratagems.restrictions: An unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit. You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: Your opponent's Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or when an enemy unit starts or ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move. TARGET: One unit from your army that is within 24" of that enemy unit and that would be eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase. EFFECT: Your unit can shoot that enemy unit as if it were your Shooting phase. RESTRICTIONS: An unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit. You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

coreStratagems.name: Go to Ground
coreStratagems.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
coreStratagems.target: One INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
coreStratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have a 6+ invulnerable save and have the Benefit of Cover.
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have a 6+ invulnerable save and have the Benefit of Cover.

coreStratagems.name: Grenade
coreStratagems.target: One GRENADES unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
coreStratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your GRENADES unit. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One GRENADES unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase. EFFECT: Select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your GRENADES unit. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

coreStratagems.name: Heroic Intervention
coreStratagems.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
coreStratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
coreStratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase.
coreStratagems.restrictions: You can only select a VEHICLE unit if it is a WALKER. Your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move. TARGET: One unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase. EFFECT: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase. RESTRICTIONS: You can only select a VEHICLE unit if it is a WALKER. Your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

coreStratagems.name: Insane Bravery
coreStratagems.when: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just after you have failed a Battle-shock test taken for a unit from your army.
coreStratagems.target: The unit from your army that Battle-shock test was just taken for (even though your Battle-shocked units cannot normally be affected by your Stratagems).
coreStratagems.effect: Your unit is treated as having passed that test instead, and is not Battle-shocked as a result.
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just after you have failed a Battle-shock test taken for a unit from your army. TARGET: The unit from your army that Battle-shock test was just taken for (even though your Battle-shocked units cannot normally be affected by your Stratagems). EFFECT: Your unit is treated as having passed that test instead, and is not Battle-shocked as a result.

coreStratagems.name: Rapid Ingress
coreStratagems.when: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
coreStratagems.target: One unit from your army that is in Reserves.
coreStratagems.effect: Your unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
coreStratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem to enable a unit to arrive during a battle round it would not normally be able to do so in.
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: End of your opponent's Movement phase. TARGET: One unit from your army that is in Reserves. EFFECT: Your unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase. RESTRICTIONS: You cannot use this Stratagem to enable a unit to arrive during a battle round it would not normally be able to do so in.

coreStratagems.name: Tank Shock
coreStratagems.target: One VEHICLE unit from your army.
coreStratagems.effect: After your unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then select one melee weapon your unit is equipped with. Roll a number of D6 equal to that weapon's Strength characteristic. If that Strength characteristic is greater than that enemy unit's Toughness characteristic, roll two additional D6. For each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).
coreStratagems.description: WHEN: Your Charge phase. TARGET: One VEHICLE unit from your army. EFFECT: After your unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then select one melee weapon your unit is equipped with. Roll a number of D6 equal to that weapon's Strength characteristic. If that Strength characteristic is greater than that enemy unit's Toughness characteristic, roll two additional D6. For each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

ability.name: Codex Discipline
ability.description: At the start of your Command phase, if you have Battle-shock tokens on any of your ULTRAMARINES units, you can remove one of those Battle-shock tokens.
